title: Defile x 3D Sun
body:
A TexturePack for [DoctoR4t](https://www.youtube.com/@doctor4t) 's [Defile](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) Mod*, shown in his [latest video](https://youtu.be/kNPDNK02m2M?si=73GvpdOCCOftpYCF).
Use with another texturepack that adds by default 3D sun & moon like [this one](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-sun-moon) for a better experience, as this texture only adds it for the Eclipsed Sun of Defile.
This pack also adds support to mods like [Idwtialsimmoedm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/idwtialsimmoedm) or [JEED](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) adding a description of Inkmorphosis effect.
Works both 1.19.2 and 1.20.1




~~_*IMPORTANT Defile mod is currently not publicly obtainable, as its RAT's Ko-Fi supporters only. BUT as stated by rat it will be released to anyone in the future, he just need to polish the mod from bugs and other features_~~ **DEFILE RELEASED PUBLICLY NOW**

P.S: Defile is a standalone addon of BeFoul, that is a Luxintrus' Ko-Fi supporters only mod
